corrections.text: The article attributes the three Program-of-Record names (Protected Tactical Satcom-Global / PTS-G, Resilient GPS, Andromeda) to SpaceNews. Those strings do not appear in the SpaceNews snapshot — they likely come from the Yahoo Finance press-release source, which redirected to a consent gate and could not be verified from the snapshot. The substance is corroborated by the Gedmark quote 'spooling up to support multiple US Government programs of record simultaneously' which IS verbatim in SpaceNews; the attribution should have been to the press release rather than SpaceNews.
